name: 100% Whole Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in 2/3 cup water while the milk is cooling.
2. Dissolve 1 cup sugar in the hot milk.
3. In a large bowl, stir together all ingredients. Add flour as needed and knead until smooth, about 5 minutes.
4. Let dough rise until doubled in size, approximately 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
5. Shape dough into 6 loaves and place in pans. Let rise until doubled again.
6. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
7. Turn bread out onto a wire rack and let cool completely before slicing.
